summary: Comprehensive regression testing of Locofast B2B platform v2.0 across Agent, Vendor, and Enterprise modules. 36/36 backend tests passed. Fixed critical bug in AgentLoginPage.js (body stream already read error). Verified CheckoutPage error handling works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: 'Failed to execute text on Response: body stream already read' error when sending OTP. Root cause: fetch() with res.text() pattern was being intercepted. Fixed by switching to axios.

passed_tests: - POST /api/vendor/fabrics creates new fabric with all fields
- GET /api/vendor/orders returns orders with vendor's fabrics
- POST /api/brand/login returns brand_type, token, role, designation
- GET /api/brand/me returns user and brand info
- GET /api/brand/credit-summary shows Stride and Muthoot credit lines
- POST /api/agent/send-otp sends OTP to agent email
- POST /api/agent/verify-otp returns token + agent info (OTP bypass via MongoDB)
- GET /api/agent/exchange-rate returns INR→USD rate for Bangladesh dispatch
- POST /api/agent/shared-cart creates cart with token (India dispatch)
- GET /api/agent/cart/{token} returns public cart (no auth required)
- GET /api/admin/brands lists brands with type and parent_brand_name
- Brand login → enterprise fabrics page works
- CheckoutPage shows error UI for invalid fabric_id with Retry/Back buttons
critical_code_review_comments: AgentLoginPage.js was still using fetch() with res.text() pattern which caused 'body stream already read' errors. Fixed by switching to axios like AgentDashboardPage.js
CheckoutPage.js error handling works correctly - shows error UI with data-testid='checkout-fabric-load-error' when fabric fetch fails
All three modules (Agent, Vendor, Enterprise) have working login flows
Credit lines and sample credits are correctly pre-seeded for Test Brand Co
seed_data_creation: Created test fabrics during vendor tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three modules (Agent, Vendor, Enterprise) tested and working. AgentLoginPage.js was fixed to use axios instead of fetch to resolve 'body stream already read' error. CheckoutPage error handling verified working with data-testid='checkout-fabric-load-error'. Agent OTP bypass: patch agent_otps collection in MongoDB to set otp='123456' for the latest pending OTP doc. Credit lines: Stride (₹100k fully utilized), Muthoot (₹500k, ₹386k available). Sample credits: 502 total, 192 available.

bugs_fixed.issue: Failed to execute 'text' on 'Response': body stream already read
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Using fetch() with res.text() pattern which can be intercepted by browser extensions causing the body stream to be consumed twice
bugs_fixed.fix: Switched from fetch() to axios for both handleSendOTP and handleVerifyOTP functions
